description: You are a QA manager preparing for a v1.1 release. The project requires complete test coverage for the 'File Operations' section of the SRS document. Create new test suites in the 'Test Cases > File Operations' section of the TESTS document for SRS-61 (Document Template - creating template from document), SRS-72 (Import - importing from MS Word), and SRS-76 (Export - exporting to HTML). Each test suite must be set to 'Draft' status, follow the established naming convention (e.g., 'Open Local File'), and include a verification traceability link to its corresponding SRS requirement. The application is already open with the project loaded.

required_test_suites.srs_text_contains: export the displayed document view to HTML
